title: Pudgy Penguins (PENGU) Surges 7.26% as Meme Coin Maintains Top 110 Market Position
excerpt: Pudgy Penguins token (PENGU) climbs over 7% in 24 hours, trading at $0.0077135 while holding its position as the #107 cryptocurrency by market cap. The NFT-backed meme coin continues to attract investor attention despite broader market volatility.
